# hetznerrobot_failover (Resource)

Routes a Hetzner Robot failover IP to a target server. Destroying the resource resets the routing back to the failover IP's primary server.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `active_server_ip` (String) The main IP of the server the failover IP should currently route to.
- `ip` (String) The failover IP to route. Must be an existing failover IP on the account.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `netmask` (String) Netmask reported by the API for the failover IP.
- `server_ip` (String) Main IP of the failover IP's primary (owner) server.
- `server_number` (Number) Server number of the failover IP's primary (owner) server.
